---
title: OsisParserUI
filters:
  - quarto-svelte
quarto-svelte:
  use:
    - ../components/OsisParserUI.svelte
format: html
---

<style>
/* Adjust the height of the title block banner */
quarto-title-banner {
height: 80px; /* Increase or decrease as needed */
}

/* Adjust the font size of the title */
#title-block-header h3 {
font-size: 1.5rem; /* Adjust font size */
}
</style>

> strict idempotent OSIS conversion - _Intra component communication via windows.store_. TODO:  H-store vs O-store

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
myOsisParser = html`<my-osisparserui></my-osisparserui>`
```
